hostId.description: The UID of the user who created the session.

status.description: The current status of the session.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the session was created.

groups.description: An array of groups, where each group is an array of participants.

GroupMember.title: Group Member
GroupMember.description: A member within a generated group.

Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: A user who has joined a session.

name.description: The display name of the participant.

avatar.description: The emoji avatar selected by the participant.

joinedAt.description: The timestamp when the participant joined the session.

/artifacts/{appId}/public/{data}/session.description: Stores participants for a specific session.
